steps.title: Identify the function of the underlined sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence defines a linguistic term—reduplication—that names and explains the pattern shown in the preceding example.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined sentence provides a general definition of reduplication, clarifying what this linguistic phenomenon is called and how it works.

The other three choices focus on different information—geographical origin, word translations, or language comparisons—that the underlined sentence does not address.

That matches Choice D — It provides a general definition of the phenomenon discussed in the text..
